permission.changedMessage: Background location permission has been changed. Please enable "Always" location access in Settings for continuous tracking.
permission.requiredMessage: Background location tracking requires "Always" location permission. Would you like to grant it?
permission.deniedMessage: Background tracking requires "Always" location access. Please enable it in Settings.

tracking.statusError: Failed to check tracking status. Please try again.
tracking.toggleError: Failed to toggle tracking. Please try again.
tracking.stopConfirmMessage: Your activities will no longer be tracked automatically. You can still log trips manually.

auth.profileLoadFailedMessage: Your profile couldn't be loaded. Some features may be limited.

backgroundPermission.title: Background Tracking Permission
backgroundPermission.iosMessage:
To track your activities automatically, Radzi needs "Always Allow" location access.

1. Tap "Settings" below
2. Go to Location
3. Select "Always"

This allows the app to track your walks and rides even when you're not actively using it.
backgroundPermission.androidMessage:
To track your activities automatically, Radzi needs location access all the time.

Please grant "Allow all the time" permission in the next screen.

This allows the app to track your walks and rides in the background.
